allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix document-formats -> documents feature flag mismatch

The Cargo.toml feature was renamed to `documents` but source code still
referenced the old `document-formats` name, causing cfg warnings. Also
adds missing Pdf variant to DocumentFormat match in auto_indexing and
updates PENDING.md dependency snippet to match actual Cargo.toml.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
